title: No CI configuration - tests not run automatically on PRs
description:
**Ease of Contribution / Quality Gates**

The README documents test commands but there's no CI configuration:
- No .github/workflows/
- No .gitlab-ci.yml
- No tox.ini for multi-python testing

Without CI:
1. PRs can't be validated automatically
2. Contributors don't know if their changes break things
3. Main branch can accumulate breakage
4. No enforcement of mypy/ruff passing

Recommended: Add GitHub Actions workflow that:
- Runs on PR and push to main
- Tests Python 3.11 and 3.12
- Runs: ruff check, mypy, pytest
- Optionally: coverage reporting

Example workflow file provided in description or linked.

Files: .github/workflows/ci.yml (new)
close_reason: Added .github/workflows/ci.yml: GitHub Actions on push(main)+PR, matrix py3.11/3.12, ruff check + pytest. Mirrors documented local setup (explicit deps + PYTHONPATH=src). Excludes tests/sim/test_integration.py pending lora_ipv6_mesh-fgk (BARRIER_SYNC hang) with pytest-timeout safety net. Verified 768 passed locally with the CI command. Added pytest-timeout to dev deps. d94 tracks future Rust/Zephyr jobs.
